rules.rule: No compat shims, wrapper modules, aliases for retired names, migration helpers, or anticipatory code. A rename replaces every call site in the same change.

Extend the canonical owner: each vocabulary axis (color, keybind, MCP server, tool admission) has exactly one declaring owner per docs/laws/projections.md, and new capability lands as a row on that owner. A new singleton file or duplicated value for an owned axis is a defect.

Shell bodies — packaged via writeShellApplication or standalone .sh including .claude hooks — declare runtimeInputs where packaged, use set -euo pipefail, pass shellcheck without directives, and embed no repo paths, usernames, or magic values. An '|| true' survives only as a pipefail rail where non-zero exit is an expected data condition (probe no-match, vanished process, torn tail line of a live-appended file); an '|| true' that hides a real failure class is a defect. Literal associative-array subscripts are quoted (shfmt rewrites bare hyphenated keys as arithmetic, corrupting dispatch tables). Receipts trail the action they attest: state= transitions per landed step, result= only after the final step.

forge-provision emits schema-v3 JSON envelopes only; agent-facing JSON never carries socket paths, host absolute paths, or token material; every envelope change lands with its README contract row; jq programs live in jq/ files, never inlined in Bash.

services/ TypeScript follows docs/stacks/typescript law: Effect rails, tagged faults, Config.redacted, Schema boundary decodes, typed Pulumi rows, secrets never in unredacted state outputs. Dependency movement is forward-only: a downgrade or stale pin without a recorded reason is a defect.

Lua and TOML app config consumes Nix-owned vocabulary projections; a private hex color, ad hoc keybind, or duplicated theme value in consumer config is a defect — the value belongs on the generating owner. Lua consumers index generated row tables directly (a hand-written key mirror is the two-edit drift the projection exists to kill); host callback-registration APIs register permanently per call, so actions build once per config generation, never inside press/open/event bodies; a theme role bound to a highlight group is proven against the plugin's real group names from source. A hand-template-to-row-table collapse of generated config is gated by baseline eval-diff: snapshot the rendered bytes, rebuild, diff — byte-fidelity risk is dischargeable, never a reason to defer.

Cross-module seams are single-owner projections mapped in docs/atlas/interconnection.md. A change touching an owner surface (theme roles, chord rows, ssh host rows, ignoreEstate, MCP fleet manifest, register grammar, receipt env-key grammar, attention-feed fields, XDG projection paths, zjstatus pipe names) must land with its consumers verified; a consumer-side literal that re-derives an owner value, a renamed field only one side knows about, or a new kernel hand-rolling an owned grammar (receipt paths, launchd labels, envelope keys) is drift. When an owner gains a new vocabulary family (a theme role set, a register column), every consumer projection block is grepped and extended in the same change — a family present in the owner but absent from one projection is an invisible fork.

Workflow scripts are deterministic orchestration: schema-typed agent outputs, bounded loops, stage products written to disk with path receipts. Bare promises, unbounded polling, wall-clock branching, and subagents instructed to wait are defects.

Every install step depending on upstream layout — strips, wrapper targets, conditional install branches — carries an existence guard that fails the build with a named drift error: silent strips ship fatter outputs on drift, silent-skip guards ship thinner ones, both are the same defect. Package layout vocabulary is single-owner via passthru projections; a per-package kernel file is admitted only when install logic differs — a data-only delta belongs on the manifest row.

VS Code keys and color tokens verify against the shipped workbench bundle or the installed extension manifests, never recall; asserted rows pin design law, never extension-behavior toggles with UI side effects; universal (user-level) rows respect per-key language-block merges and application-scope exclusions — an application- or machine-scoped key promoted into workspace guidance is a defect.
